CREATE TABLE test_map (id INTEGER, value_map MAP<Integer, Integer>);
SELECT id, map_values(value_map) FROM test_map WHERE id = 1;
WITH nested_map AS (SELECT map([100, 5], [42, 43]) AS my_map) SELECT map_values(my_map) FROM nested_map;
CREATE TABLE additional_map (category STRING, map_col MAP<String, String>);
INSERT INTO additional_map VALUES ('A', map(['key1', 'key2'], ['val1', 'val2'])), ('B', map(['k1', 'k2', 'k3'], ['v1', 'v2', 'v3']));
SELECT category, map_values(map_col) AS values_list FROM additional_map;
SELECT test_map.id, map_values(test_map.value_map) AS values_list FROM test_map JOIN additional_map ON test_map.id = 1;
CREATE TABLE complex_map (group_id INTEGER, value_map MAP<Integer, MAP<String, Integer>>);
INSERT INTO complex_map VALUES (1, map([1], map(['inner_key1', 'inner_key2'], [100, 200]))), (2, map([2], map(['inner_key3'], [300])));
SELECT group_id, map_values(value_map) AS complex_values FROM complex_map;
CREATE TABLE product_map (product_id INTEGER, attributes MAP<String, String>);
INSERT INTO product_map VALUES (1, map(['color', 'size'], ['red', 'M'])), (2, map(['color', 'size'], ['blue', 'L']));
SELECT product_id, map_values(attributes) FROM product_map WHERE map_values(attributes) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT test_map.id, map_values(value_map) AS values_list FROM test_map WHERE value_map IS NOT NULL;
